rightsPolicy: Catalogue-specific public redistribution permission has not been established. Downloads are for acknowledged local scientific use and review only.

ldn.name: Lynds' Catalogue of Dark Nebulae
ldn.requiredAcknowledgement: Acknowledge the VizieR service and cite the original publication identified by bibcode 1962ApJS....7....1L in scientific use.
ldn.licenseStatement: No catalogue-specific redistribution licence was identified during source review; redistribution requires a separate rights review or permission.
ldn.modifications: Parsed VII/7A/ldn; converted published FK4 B1950 positions to ICRS with Astropy; normalized identifiers and cross-identifications; derived area-equivalent circular diameters and marked them approximate.

barnard.name: Barnard's Catalogue of 349 Dark Objects in the Sky
barnard.requiredAcknowledgement: Acknowledge the VizieR service and cite the original publication identified by bibcode 1927cdos.book.....B in scientific use.
barnard.licenseStatement: No catalogue-specific redistribution licence was identified during source review; redistribution requires a separate rights review or permission.
barnard.modifications: Parsed VII/220A/barnard and its notes table; converted published FK4 B1875 positions to ICRS with Astropy; normalized identifiers; aggregated multi-row notes without changing published diameters.

lbn.name: Lynds' Catalogue of Bright Nebulae
lbn.requiredAcknowledgement: Acknowledge the VizieR service and cite the original publication identified by bibcode 1965ApJS...12..163L in scientific use.
lbn.licenseStatement: No catalogue-specific redistribution licence was identified during source review; redistribution requires a separate rights review or permission.
lbn.modifications: Parsed VII/9/catalog; converted published FK4 B1950 positions to ICRS with Astropy; normalized identifiers and cross-identifications; retained published axes or derived approximate area-equivalent diameters; treated zero colour and brightness classes as unknown.

sharpless.name: Catalogue of H II Regions
sharpless.requiredAcknowledgement: Acknowledge the VizieR service and cite the original publication identified by bibcode 1959ApJS....4..257S in scientific use.
sharpless.licenseStatement: No catalogue-specific redistribution licence was identified during source review; redistribution requires a separate rights review or permission.
sharpless.modifications: Parsed VII/20/catalog; converted published FK4 B1900 positions to ICRS with Astropy; normalized Sh2 identifiers; retained the published maximum diameter and marked non-round forms approximate.

vdb.name: Catalogue of Reflection Nebulae
vdb.requiredAcknowledgement: Acknowledge the VizieR service and cite the original publication identified by bibcode 1966AJ.....71..990V in scientific use.
vdb.licenseStatement: No catalogue-specific redistribution licence was identified during source review; redistribution requires a separate rights review or permission.
vdb.modifications: Parsed VII/21/catalog; converted the catalogue's original Galactic positions to ICRS with Astropy; retained VizieR-added SIMBAD star coordinates only as supplementary provenance; derived approximate diameters from maximum plate radii and did not treat illuminating-star magnitude as nebular magnitude.

rcw.name: H-alpha emission regions in the Southern Milky Way
rcw.authors: Rodgers A.W.; Campbell C.T.; Whiteoak J.B.
rcw.requiredAcknowledgement: Acknowledge the VizieR service and cite the original publication identified by bibcode 1960MNRAS.121..103R in scientific use.
rcw.licenseStatement: No catalogue-specific redistribution licence was identified during source review; redistribution requires a separate rights review or permission.
rcw.modifications: Parsed VII/216/rcw and its notes table; converted published FK4 B1950 positions to ICRS with Astropy; normalized cross-identifications; aggregated multi-row notes and retained published axes and brightness codes.

dcld.name: Catalogue of Southern Dark Clouds
dcld.authors: Hartley M.; Manchester R.N.; Smith R.M.; Tritton S.B.; Goss W.M.
dcld.requiredAcknowledgement: Acknowledge the VizieR service and cite the original publication identified by bibcode 1986A&AS...63...27H in scientific use.
dcld.licenseStatement: No catalogue-specific redistribution licence was identified during source review; redistribution requires a separate rights review or permission.
dcld.modifications: Parsed VII/191/table1; converted published FK4 B1950 positions to ICRS with Astropy; normalized aliases while preserving signed designations; retained repeated designations as distinct rows and retained the published axes or total-length caveat.

feitzinger.name: Dark Nebulae and Globules for Galactic Longitudes 240-360 degrees
feitzinger.requiredAcknowledgement: Acknowledge the VizieR service and cite the original publication identified by bibcode 1984A&AS...58..365F in scientific use.
feitzinger.licenseStatement: No catalogue-specific redistribution licence was identified during source review; redistribution requires a separate rights review or permission.
feitzinger.modifications: Parsed only VII/68A/darkneb (FeSt 1 extended clouds); converted published FK4 B1950 positions to ICRS with Astropy; normalized identifiers and cross-identifications; derived approximate area-equivalent diameters and retained Galactic inclination as a non-equatorial property.
feitzinger.tableScope: darkneb (FeSt 1 extended clouds) only; globules/FeSt 2 are future work
